settings.title: VOLUME
settings.description: Wallin has developed a last with anatomically correct volume, which ensures that your feet have space. The extra space at the forefoot ensures increased comfort as there is no pressure on the feet from the sides, front or top of the shoe.

settings.title: THREADED SOLE
settings.description: Wallin's experienced orthopedic shoemakers have developed an orthopedically correct insole. The curved shape of the insole ensures a natural rolling motion for the musculoskeletal system when walking. This rolling distributes the weight across the entire foot and reduces pressure on the joints of the foot.

settings.title: REMOVABLE INSOLES
settings.description: he Wallinskoen comes with an antibacterial insole, which can be replaced with a custom-made insole if needed.  Under the insole is a 3mm foam insert, which can be removed if needed to create even more volume in the shoe.
